subject: Fw: dag depo
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: jeffrey epstein <littlestjeff@yahoo.com>
To: mike tein <tein@lewistein.com>; Martin Weinberg <owlmgw@worldnet.att.net>
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; Guy Lewis <glewis@lewistein.com>
Sent: Saturday, May 31, 2008 1:26:35 PM
Subject: 

 Mike Marty, I think we should prepare a list of questions for the DAG to ask marie sloman, maybe menshel, Alex, drew.. i.e.let's do their work for them.. 
sloman depo, did you write that you were willing to defer incarc to the state. ? the state has no recolletcion of that, and the documents say otherwise. 
did you promise an indpendent de novo review? asp er your letter, were you aware the ceos had LAready made a determination , that it couldn't decline.
did you tell david weinstein that epstein wanted armed guards and house arrest
did you tell the defense that house arrest was unacceptable because in Epsteins case it would be MANSION ARREST
did you ask epstein to reaffirm his commitment to the agreementand then claim he had no intetnio to comply
did you stop them from investigating the girls
marie, did you say the victims required a guardina ad litem, as they were minors. 
did you say that you could prove tatum miller a victim because there was a toll record 
did you write that epstein would pay the fees of the attny as long as it was the one provided by the government. 
did you attach an afffadavit to a court document that you knew to be misleading
did you suggst a violation of a money transmitting business though none existedl
ALex, did you promise there would be finality
were you informed of the new york times leak
did you suggest that the reason for ceos involvment was bonb senior did not have the time
 did you suugest that they had the right to modify the agreement. 
 did you tell lily sanchez that you were out of it
if you self reported , did you include the fact that sloman had lied about the leak
if you think relevant -drew, what did jeffrey sloman tell you before the review
why did it take two months to begin.
 did you say you would try the case yourself, prior to sept 7
